display_information.name: AgentFlow
display_information.description: MCP-Powered Research Agent - Web search, multi-perspective analysis, persistent memory, and channel summarization right in Slack.
display_information.long_description:
AgentFlow transforms Slack into an intelligent research command center using Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool orchestration.

Core capabilities:
• 🔍 Research - Live web search with source extraction and relevance scoring
• 🏛️ Council - Multi-perspective decision analysis through 5 independent AI advisors with peer review and chairman synthesis
• 🧠 Memory - Persistent context storage across conversations
• 📝 Summarize - Channel and thread summarization into structured notes

Built with the Slack Bolt SDK and MCP patterns for extensible tool integration.

assistant_view.assistant_description: AgentFlow transforms Slack into an intelligent research command center using Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool orchestration.

slash_commands.description: Research any topic with live web search
